creator: johann@egenetics.com
text:
- Update of port textproc/py-xml from PyXML 0.5.4 to 0.6.2.
- Has been discussed with MAINTAINER, who asked me to go ahead and
  submit a PR.
- PyXML 0.6.2 works with Python 1.5.2 and Python 2.0.  In Python 2.0 it uses
  some magic to "override" the xml package which is part of the standard
  library distributed with the language.  It is interface-compatible to the
  built-in xml package, but with extended functionality.
- This port update should probably necessitate an update in the PyXML
  dependency in bsd.python.mk, as already discussed with tg@freebsd.org
- Deleted file:  pkg-plist.python1.5
- Tested on (Python 2.0 / 5-CURRENT) and (Python 1.5 / 3-STABLE)
